title: Report on a project
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Report on a project demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Identify project processes and outcomes

pcs.text: Identify scope of report and target audience from contract, program guidelines or procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify scope of report and target audience from contract, program guidelines or procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify scope of report and target audience from contract, program guidelines or procedures.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Research project background.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Circulate draft report to stakeholders for comment.

elements.title: Revise and submit report for distribution

pcs.text: Revise draft report to address comments from consultation

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Revise draft report to address comments from consultation.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Submit any unresolved issues to stakeholders for decision.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Complete and submit project report within approved timeframes.
